goal: Add Real Backend Test attribution for public heavy detail payload size and receive timing without changing workload realism.
changed: Added k6 target receiving trend from response.timings.receiving
Extended RealLoadTestTargetMetrics with responseBytesP95 and receiveP95Ms
Displayed Payload P95 and Receive P95 in the Real Backend target summary
Added backend and frontend regression tests
notChanged: No public DTO response shape change
No DB schema or query behavior change

validations.command: diff guard for pageSize=1, seed priority, cache shortcut
Playwright real backend dashboard mock flow

risks: responseBytesP95 is attribution, not exact wire-byte accounting when compression or chunking is involved
receiveP95Ms is k6 client receive time and is not standalone server serialization time
small smoke validates plumbing, not production capacity
recommendation: Promote this measurement slice, then run realistic 100/300/500 rps public mix tests and choose payload split, DB/pool, or serialization optimization based on the new attribution metrics.
